summary.archival_abstract: Official support article titled “How to lock your Polis?.” This record preserves what Star Atlas Support / ATMTA publicly stated at the recorded publication time; claims about delivery, economics, or outcomes remain limited to the wording of the source.
summary.historical_value: Official evidence baseline for later reconciliation with community reporting.
summary.current_validity_warning: Official publication does not independently prove successful execution, completeness, or continued current validity.

article_text:
Locking your POLIS tokens grants you POLIS Voting Power (PVP), which allows you to participate in governance and shape the future of Star Atlas.
You can lock POLIS on the official governance platform:
https://govern.staratlas.com/lockers
Step-by-Step: Lock POLIS for Governance Power
Go to the Governance Website
Visit govern.staratlas.com/lockers
Click “Connect Wallet” and approve the connection using your Solana wallet (e.g., Phantom, Backpack, etc.).
Click “Lock POLIS”
On the Lockers page, locate the POLIS Locker section.
Click the “Lock POLIS” button to begin the process.
Choose Lock Period & Amount
Scroll down to the lock settings.
Select the amount of POLIS you want to lock.
Choose your lock duration using the slider (longer locks = more PVP).
Review the summary and confirm you're happy with your inputs.
Approve the Transaction
Click “Lock Token” and approve the transaction in your wallet.
Once confirmed, your POLIS is locked and you’ve earned PVP, giving you access to vote and contribute in the DAO.
📌 Notes
Locked POLIS cannot be withdrawn before the end of the chosen lock period.
The longer you lock, the more PVP you receive per POLIS.
You’ll be able to see your active locks and rewards on the same page
